commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pod -n yanxi-validation nccl-tests-efa-worker-0 -o yaml 2>/dev/null | grep -A 20 "name: worker" | head -40 || echo no-nccl-pod'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get events -n yanxi-validation 2>&1 | grep uccl-ep | tail -15'
